goal: Record the current package-boundary decision now that the internal namespaces and implementation moves are in place.
constraints: Do not split packages in this tranche
Make the decision rule explicit and reversible with concrete future triggers
behavioral_changes: No runtime or import behavior changes.
The repo now has an explicit packaging decision instead of an open-ended placeholder.
Future package splitting is gated by concrete triggers rather than broad aspiration.
verification_targets: Manual consistency review across README.md, docs/PACKAGE_BOUNDARY_MIGRATION_PLAN.md, docs/EXECUTION_PLAN_2026-03-21.md, and docs/REPO_SURFACES_AND_STATUS.md
follow_up: If future release pressure or external usage patterns change, revisit the split triggers instead of reopening the whole packaging question from scratch.
Keep investing in internal namespace hygiene so a future split remains operationally cheap if it becomes justified.
